app.brandDescription: Route-based app shell for the web workspace.

notFound.description: The route you requested is not available in the current web workspace. Use the primary navigation or go back to the visit logs page.
notFound.title: Page not found

routeError.description: The current route failed before the page could render normally. Return to a stable page and try again.
routeError.responseDescription: The route returned {{status}} {{statusText}} before the page could render normally. Return to a stable page and try again.
routeError.title: Route failed to render

hero.title: Shared UI Showcase
hero.description: Token-based primitives for forms, feedback, overlays, and layout patterns. This page groups the current component set into a single preview surface for the web app.

banner.title: Showcase preview mode
banner.description: Use this page to review component combinations before wiring them into real product screens.

form.title: Text and field primitives
form.description: Input, textarea, select, and field composition on top of the shared token system.

selection.title: Choice and preference inputs
selection.description: Checkbox, radio, and switch patterns for product settings and communication preferences.

feedback.title: Alerts, banners, and status labels
feedback.description: Short-lived and persistent feedback patterns using the same semantic color tokens.

overlay.title: Layered interaction patterns
overlay.description: Dialog, toast, menu, and popover previews now share the app-level showcase surface rather than living only in isolated stories.

empty.title: No-data product states
empty.description: Empty states explain why a surface is blank and suggest the next action instead of leaving the user with an empty shell.

email.label: Email address
email.helper: We use this email for async design system updates.

message.label: Message
message.helper: Describe the workflow you want to prototype next.
message.placeholder: Share more context about the screen or form you want to build.

propertyType.label: Property type
propertyType.helper: Native select stays close to platform behavior.

checkbox.label: Email me component release notes
checkbox.helper: You can unsubscribe whenever the design system stabilizes.

radio.label: Preferred contact method
radio.helper: Radio groups work well when all options should stay visible.

switch.title: Release notifications
switch.description: Toggle digest emails for new shared-ui updates.

success.title: Changes published
success.description: Shared UI feedback components now share the same semantic token palette across Storybook and the web app.

error.title: Validation error
error.description: At least one required field is missing. Use error messaging close to the input and a summary at the top when needed.

dialog.title: Create a new visit log
dialog.description: Review the shared modal structure before you wire it into a real workflow.

field.label: Title
field.helper: Keep the modal body focused on one short task.

toast.title: Toast preview
toast.description: Use toasts for transient success or failure signals after an action completes.
toast.toastDescription: Your showcase preferences were saved for the current session.

menu.title: Dropdown menu preview
menu.description: Use menus for grouped actions rather than value selection.
menu.label: Visit log actions

popover.title: Popover preview
popover.description: Use popovers for contextual panels that need richer content than a simple menu.
popover.panelDescription: Keep lightweight settings near the trigger instead of opening a full dialog.
popover.previewValue: Apartments, under 1B KRW, and 10 minutes from transit

empty.title: No visit logs yet
empty.description: Start by creating the first property visit note. This is where your shared-ui primitives begin to feel like a product.

error.description: The visit log detail could not be loaded due to a temporary request failure. Go back to the list and try again.
error.title: Failed to load the visit log

empty.description: The selected visit log could not be found in the current workspace data.
empty.title: Visit log not found

deleted.description: "{{title}}" was removed from the current visit log workspace.
deleted.title: Visit log deleted

updated.description: "{{title}}" was updated and synced to the detail view.
updated.title: Visit log updated

pinned.description: Focus on high-priority logs you marked for follow-up.
pinned.label: Pinned only

pageSize.helper: Change how many visit logs are shown per page.
pageSize.label: Page size

search.helper: Search by title, district, or agent name.
search.label: Search visit logs
search.placeholder: Search by title, district, or agent

sort.helper: The query hook refetches when the sort changes.
sort.label: Sort by

summary.description: Keep feature-specific filters close to the domain page instead of the shared-ui layer.
summary.title: Quick view filters

alert.description: The query layer is real, but the data source is still mocked. This gives the page a production-like state boundary without locking the screen to a fake in-component array.
alert.title: Current implementation note

banner.description: This page is structured as a feature-based screen backed by TanStack Query, even though the current data source is still mocked.
banner.title: Visit logs domain preview

page.description: The page composition now lives on top of a feature-layer structure: API, service, hook, domain components, and a thin page entry.
page.title: Visit logs workspace

toast.description: The new draft has been added through the feature mutation flow.
toast.title: Visit log created

error.description: The current visit log list could not be loaded. Retry the request or return later.
error.title: Failed to load visit logs

empty.title: Nothing matched your filters
empty.description: Try widening the current filters or create a fresh visit log to start a new review thread.

createDialog.title: Create a new visit log
createDialog.description: Capture a new draft without breaking the feature-layer boundaries.

placeholders.title: Songpa riverside apartment revisit
placeholders.summary: Notes about sunlight, noise, and commute conditions.

createDialog.error: Failed to create the visit log.

editDialog.title: Edit visit log
editDialog.description: Update the current log through the feature mutation flow.

placeholders.title: Songpa riverside apartment revisit
placeholders.summary: Notes about sunlight, noise, and commute conditions.

editDialog.error: Failed to update the visit log.

deleteDialog.title: Delete visit log
deleteDialog.description: Review the selected record before removing it.

message.withTitle: Delete "{{title}}" from the current visit log workspace?
message.fallback: Are you sure you want to delete this visit log?

deleteDialog.warning: This action updates the feature state immediately and cannot be undone.
deleteDialog.error: Failed to delete the visit log.
